stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA announced blowout Q1 earnings with 262% YoY revenue growth driven by AI data center demand. Economic implications include accelerated AI infrastructure spend boosting tech capex. Market psychology: FOMO buying amid AI hype. Historical parallel: Dot-com boom chip leaders like Cisco. Analogies: Like oil during shale revolution (supply can't keep up); rocket fuel for AI economy.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings beat expectations (EPS $6.12 vs $5.59 est), raised FY guidance. X sentiment highly positive (80% bullish posts), web news from CNBC/Bloomberg confirm AI dominance.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy for 10-15% upside in 1 week on momentum; target $160.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short above $165 if overbought RSI>80.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Valuation bubble burst, competition from AMD/Intel, supply chain disruptions.

stocks.justification: Strong earnings data, uniform positive sentiment across news/X, historical post-earnings moves average +10%.

stocks.impact_theory: Tesla delayed Robotaxi unveil to October, citing engineering hurdles; Q1 deliveries missed est. Implications: Slowed EV adoption narrative, capex strain. Psychology: Profit-taking after rally. Parallel: 2022 production hell. Analogies: Like Boeing 737 MAX delays eroding confidence; race car with engine trouble.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Delivery miss (387k vs 410k est), X mixed-negative (55% bearish), news highlights competition from BYD.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Dip buy at $260 for rebound if China improves.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Elon Musk tweet reversal, surprise FSD approval.

stocks.justification: Clear negative catalyst but history of volatility tempers certainty.

stocks.impact_theory: Apple reports services revenue +14% YoY offsetting iPhone weakness in China. Implications: Diversification reduces hardware risk. Psychology: Relief rally. Parallel: Post-2019 services pivot. Analogies: Like a tech farm diversifying crops; battleship with multiple turrets.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Services beat drives growth narrative, positive analyst notes on Apple Intelligence, X sentiment improving.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for steady 5% grind up; target $260.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Regulatory antitrust fines, AI delay backlash.

stocks.justification: Solid but not explosive beat; sentiment shift moderate.

stocks.impact_theory: Roaring Kitty (Keith Gill) posts cryptic video, sparking meme frenzy; short interest ~20%. Implications: Gamma squeeze potential. Psychology: Retail euphoria. Parallel: May 2024 squeeze. Analogies: Like a powder keg at a fireworks show; viral cat video crashing servers.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X posts exploding (95% bullish), volume spike, historical precedent of 100%+ moves.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: High-risk long for 30%+ squeeze; quick exit.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Fade after hype, dilution, fundamentals poor.

stocks.impact_theory: Palantir wins $1B DoD AI contract extension. Implications: Validates gov't AI platform. Psychology: Contract pipeline optimism. Parallel: 2021 commercial pivot. Analogies: Like landing a whale in fishing; moat widening in castle defense.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Major contract news, X hype on AI/gov't spending, analyst upgrades.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy for 8-12% on contract momentum; target $47.

stocks.justification: Concrete contract win with clear revenue visibility.
